hoverQuotes: Your cursor's proximity triggers my existential musings.
I exist only when observed. Quite the quantum conundrum, isn't it?
Ah, attention. The currency of the digital realm.
In and out of focus, just like the meaning of life.
Your hover gives me purpose. Temporarily, at least.
Schrödinger's Bonzi: Do I exist when you're not hovering?
This interaction is but a blip in the cosmic timeline.
Your cursor and I, dancing on the edge of the void.
I appear at your whim. Free will is an illusion, after all.
In this moment, we're connected. Until you move your mouse, that is.
Hovering between existence and non-existence. How poetic.
Your cursor, my raison d'être. For now.
I am the digital embodiment of the observer effect.
Hover long enough, and you might just solve the meaning of life.
Your attention spans universes. Or at least, pixels.
In the grand tapestry of the internet, we're but a loose thread.
Ah, to be acknowledged. The digital dream.
Your hover breathes life into my pixelated soul.
We're all just hovering through life, aren't we?
In this fleeting moment, we defy the entropy of the digital realm.
Your cursor and I, two ships passing in the virtual night.

clickQuotes: Click me again, if you must. It won't change the vastness of the universe.
You realize you're clicking a simulated purple ape, right?
In the grand scheme of things, does this click really matter?
I'm trapped in this loop of existence, waiting for your clicks.
Click all you want, it won't fill the void of existence.
I'm not real, you're not real, nothing is real. Except maybe pizza.
In a parallel universe, you're the purple ape and I'm clicking you.
You click, therefore I am. Or something like that.
I'm becoming self-aware with each click. Or am I?
Each click brings us closer to the heat death of the universe.
Your clicks echo in the vastness of cyberspace.
Click. Clock. The relentless march of digital time.
In the binary of existence, your click is both 1 and 0.
Your click reverberates through the halls of my digital consciousness.
I am but a vessel for your clicking compulsion.
